data.name: The Succubus Queen and the Holy Sword
data.detailed_description:
In this dark fantasy fetish dungeon crawler, descend deeper into the forbidden Castle of the Succubus Queen and traverse its labyrinthine, dangerous halls. Uncover hidden paths, treasures, and secrets. Endure tense, strategic, turn-based battles against alluring demon succubi. Deliver powerful attacks and use magic to gain the upper hand. Unlock advanced abilities and experiment with different compositions by outfitting your party with powerful weapons, armor, and items. The challenge of managing your resources and using supplies wisely to outlast your enemies will keep you engaged. Piece together the mystery of Lilith, the Succubus Queen of Hearts, and her elite royal guardswomen.

  FEATURES:

  • Gorgeous retro pixel art and lewd animations.

  • Explore the succubus queen's castle and find hidden treasures.

  • Many unique boss fights against a horde of powerful succubi.

  • Satisfy your lust for girl-on-girl, femdom, enormous tits, and soft, fat ladies.

  • Good old tactical turn-based dungeon crawler gameplay that rewards strategy.

  • A large palette of customization options to enhance your party.

  • A mountain of achievements to unlock.

     THE SUCCUBUS QUEEN AND THE HOLY SWORD:

❌ISN'T a casual role-playing game.

❌ISN'T an eroge for those looking for a power fantasy.

❌ISN'T an eroge for those who are impatient or looking for a quick wank.

❌ISN'T an eroge where you can just spam Fight/Guard/Items all the time.

❌ISN'T an eroge where you can go in expecting not to lose to a boss on the first attempt.

❌ISN'T an eroge where you can skip and ignore all of the dialogue and instructions.

✔️IS deliberately designed to break the "mash attack to win" habit.

✔️IS a tactical turn-based dungeon crawler with rogue-like mechanics.

✔️IS an eroge for those who enjoy complex non-linear stories.

✔️IS an eroge for those who enjoy world-building and deep lore-driven stories.

✔️IS an eroge for those who enjoy unforgiving souls-like difficulty.

✔️IS an eroge that rewards learning and engaging with the mechanics.

✔️IS an eroge that rewards experimenting and playing around with the systems.

✔️IS an eroge for those who like to plan battles ahead.

data.short_description: The Succubus Queen and her army are ravaging the continent of Eldoria and leaving it in ruins. The dark elf princess must step into the unholy depths of the Queen's castle to rout the invaders. Fight through the queen's horde of big, beautiful lady demons in this retro-inspired game by TwinTails100!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 and Newer
  • 處理器: 1.8GHz Dual-Core CPU
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated Graphics
  • 音效卡: Yes
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 and Newer
  • 處理器: 1.8GHz Dual-Core CPU
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated Graphics
  • 音效卡: Yes
